title: Uruguayan Paella
description: A hearty Uruguayan-inspired dish featuring pan-seared paella crumbles and crispy gcrumbly bread.

ingredients.name: Pan
ingredients.notes: used for pan-searing the paella crumbles

instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the pan-seared paella crumbles and stir to combine with the garlic and oil.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 10-12 minutes until crispy.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
If using feta cheese, crumble it on top of the paella crumbles.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Meanwhile, preheat a separate pan over medium heat.
Add the gcrumbly bread crumbs and cook, stirring occasionally, until crispy and golden brown.
Serve the gcrumbly bread on the side, or crumble it on top of the paella crumbles for added crunch.
